mapper.select: SELECT c.*, u.real_name as teacher_name FROM class_info c LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON c.teacher_id = u.id WHERE c.id = #{id}
SELECT c.*, u.real_name as teacher_name FROM class_info c LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON c.teacher_id = u.id ORDER BY c.grade, c.class_name
SELECT c.*, u.real_name as teacher_name FROM class_info c LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON c.teacher_id = u.id WHERE c.grade = #{grade} ORDER BY c.class_name
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO class_info (class_name, grade, teacher_id, student_count) VALUES (#{className}, #{grade}, #{teacherId}, #{studentCount})
mapper.update: UPDATE class_info SET student_count = #{count} WHERE id = #{id}
